query:
SELECT season, view_name, fetched_at, CHAR_LENGTH(CAST(payload AS CHAR)) as payload_bytes
FROM espn_season_cache
WHERE season >= 2025
ORDER BY season DESC, fetched_at DESC
LIMIT 10;
